data.title: Bitcoin Faces Increased Distribution Pressure as Supply Cost Threshold Breached
data.description: Bitcoin has fallen below the 0.75 supply cost percentile, failing to recover this level. According to Odaily, the current spot trading price is lower than the cost basis of 75% of the supply, indicating rising distribution pressure. The risk level has heightened, and unless this threshold is regained, downward risk remains predominant.

data.title: ECB Minutes Highlight Potential Dollar Depreciation Risk
data.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) has released its meeting minutes, indicating concerns over the potential depreciation of the U.S. dollar. According to ChainCatcher, the minutes suggest that the U.S. monetary policy stance may be more accommodative than previously anticipated, which could lead to a weakening of the dollar.

data.title: Strategy's Credit Risk Eases with Shift to Permanent Capital Structure
data.description:
Bitcoin treasury company Strategy has seen a reduction in credit risk due to its permanent preferred stock reaching a nominal value of $83.6 billion, surpassing its $82 billion convertible debt, according to PANews. This shift towards permanent capital reduces refinancing risks and balance sheet volatility. Convertible bonds pose maturity refinancing risks and are linked to stock price volatility, whereas permanent preferred stock does not require principal repayment and pays fixed dividends, ranking between common stock and debt.

The company's preferred stock portfolio includes four instruments, with an annual dividend total of approximately $8.76 billion. Additionally, Strategy holds $2.25 billion in reserves to improve dividend coverage and reduce short-term financing risks. The number of common shares in circulation has increased from 76 million in 2020 to over 310 million, potentially alleviating dilution pressure from future bond conversions.

data.title: Binance to Introduce Sentient (SENT) Across Multiple Services
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, Sentient (SENT) is set to be integrated into several Binance services, including Binance Simple Earn, Buy Crypto, Binance Convert, Binance Margin, VIP Loan, and Binance Futures. The rollout will occur at specific dates and times, beginning with the listing of SENT Flexible Products on Binance Simple Earn on 2026-01-22 at 13:00 (UTC). Users will be able to subscribe to these products once they are listed. Additionally, SENT will be available for purchase using VISA, MasterCard, Google Pay, and Apple Pay, or through account balances on the Buy Crypto page within an hour of its listing on Binance Spot.

Binance Convert will enable trading of SENT against BTC, USDT, and other tokens at zero fees shortly after its listing on Binance Spot. SENT will also be added as a borrowable asset on VIP Loan within the same timeframe. On Binance Margin, SENT will be introduced as a new borrowable asset for Cross and Isolated Margin, along with SENT/USDT and SENT/USDC pairs, effective from 2026-01-22 at 13:00 (UTC). The same applies to Portfolio Margin, where SENT will be available for borrowing and trading in the aforementioned pairs.

For Binance Futures, the USDⓈ-M SENT Perpetual Contract will transition from pre-market trading to standard trading at 2026-01-22 at 13:00 (UTC). This transition may take up to three hours, depending on price volatility and stable index price availability. Existing positions and trading of the SENTUSDT Perpetual Contract will remain unaffected during this period. The contract will support Multi-Assets Mode, allowing users to trade across multiple margin assets. Binance may adjust contract specifications based on market risk conditions, including funding fees, tick size, and leverage. The perpetual contract will be available for Futures Copy Trading within 24 hours of launch.

data.title: ‘Totally absurd’: Circle CEO rejects bank run fears over stablecoin yields
data.description:
At the World Economic Forum, Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire rejected claims that stablecoin yields could spark bank runs, pointing to money market funds and broader shifts in finance.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/stablecoin-yields-no-bank-runs-circle-ceo-davos-2026?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: The Netherlands plans to impose an annual capital gains tax on unrealized gains from assets, including cryptocurrencies.
data.description: The Dutch Parliament's second house debated a proposed reform of the Box 3 asset tax system on Monday. Despite ongoing controversy, most political parties, including VVD, CDA, PVV, D66, and GroenLinks-PvdA, indicated they would vote in favor of the bill due to the estimated €2.3 billion annual loss to the national treasury from delayed implementation. Under the new plan, investors in stocks, bonds, and cryptocurrencies would be required to pay taxes annually on their gains, even if the investments have not yet been cashed out. Caretaker State Secretary for Taxation, Eugène Heijen, stated that while the government prefers to tax gains upon realization, this plan cannot be implemented before 2028, and the government cannot afford further delays.

data.title: glassnode: BTC spot price falls below 75% of supply cost basis
data.description: Glassnode posted on the X platform that Bitcoin has fallen below the 0.75th percentile of its supply cost and has failed to recover. The current spot trading price is below the cost basis of 75% of the supply, indicating increased distribution pressure. The risk level has increased, and unless it recovers, downside risks dominate.

data.title: Coinbase will launch Sentient (SENT) perpetual contracts.
data.description: Coinbase will launch Sentient (SENT) perpetual contracts on January 22. If liquidity conditions are met, the SENT-PERP market will open at or after 14:00 UTC.

data.title: The live-action dating travel game "Heartbeat Travel" announces its entry into Web3; RWA asset LOVEVoyage launches on RWAX.
data.description: According to official news, the live-action interactive romantic travel IP "Heartbeat Romance" has officially announced its entry into Web3. Its content-based RWA project, LOVEVoyage, will be listed tonight on the RWA-exclusive trading market RWAX, and will be one of the first key content-based RWA assets to be traded on the platform. "Heartbeat Romance" was first launched on Steam. Public data and third-party statistics show that the game has maintained a high positive review rate of 93% since its Steam launch, with approximately 12,500 concurrent users. The total online viewership of content related to the "Heartbeat Romance" IP has reached tens of millions, with top KOLs with millions of followers on domestic gaming platforms promoting the game online, and single live streams exceeding one million views. With this listing on RWAX, LOVEVoyage will package the subsequent seasons of "Heartbeat Romance," casting votes, story branches, and offline events into a "content-based RWA," combining it with on-chain governance and token economic mechanisms. This allows fans and on-chain users to continue as "viewers" or as holders and participants in the long-term value creation and sharing of the IP. The official statement indicated that the decision to issue assets on RWAX was based on its market infrastructure and liquidity capabilities for RWA assets. The aim is to leverage a unified RWA trading market to provide content assets with more transparent pricing, trading, and data accumulation opportunities. Specific issuance parameters and subsequent interactive features will be announced through official channels.

data.title: StandX: Different types of points have different weights, with transaction points having the highest weight.
data.description: StandX officially stated in an article that various points, such as referral points, trading points, DUSD holding points, market-making points, and Vaults points, have different weights, with trading points having the highest weight.

data.title: EU Parliament to Review US Trade Agreement Next Monday
data.description: The EU Parliament's trade committee is scheduled to revisit the US trade agreement next Monday. According to NS3.AI, US Commerce Secretary Lutnick has reaffirmed the United States' commitment to implementing the US-EU trade deal. This review has the potential to impact future trade relations between the two economic regions.

data.title: US Dollar Maintains Dominance Amid Global Economic Challenges
data.description: The US dollar continues to be a resilient currency, maintaining its position as a dominant asset for central banks globally. According to NS3.AI, despite facing challenges such as recessions, currency competition, and efforts towards de-dollarization, the dollar remains a preferred choice due to its ability to withstand market shocks and global economic crises. Historical trends indicate that the USD often strengthens during periods of turmoil, highlighting its unmatched liquidity and trust within the global financial system.

data.description:
While Thailand is expanding access to regulated crypto investment products, Vietnam has begun operational steps toward licensing digital asset trading […] The post Thailand and Vietnam Move to Regulate Crypto as Southeast Asia Tightens Oversight appeared first on Coindoo.

data.title: Dutch Parliament to Vote on Taxing Unrealized Capital Gains from 2028
data.description:
The Dutch Parliament is set to vote on a proposal to tax unrealized capital gains, including those from cryptocurrencies, starting in 2028. According to Foresight News, the reform, known as the 'Box 3 Actual Return Tax Law,' will assess asset appreciation annually, with a projected tax rate of 36%. Investors holding assets such as Bitcoin and stocks will be required to pay taxes on annual paper gains, even if they have not sold the assets.

This initiative follows a ruling by a Dutch court that deemed the government's previous method of taxing based on virtual returns illegal. Despite acknowledging flaws in the proposed legislation, most parliament members support it, citing that delaying its implementation could result in a loss of 2.3 billion euros for the government each year.

data.title: BlackRock CEO: Tokenization is inevitable; universal blockchain is the future.
data.description: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink believes that the tokenization and digitalization of assets is necessary and should be acted upon swiftly. Fink points out that if all investments are made on a tokenized platform, fees will decrease and democratization will increase, allowing capital to flow seamlessly between money market funds, stocks, and bonds. Furthermore, having a universal blockchain can reduce corruption. BlackRock, as the world's largest asset management company, has its flagship tokenized fund, BUIDL, built on Ethereum. The cryptocurrency community interprets Fink's comments as suggesting that Ethereum is the universal blockchain of his vision, positioning it as the infrastructure for institutional-grade real-world asset tokenization.

data.title: Binance to Adjust Interest Rates for XAUUSDT and XAGUSDT Contracts
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform will implement changes to the interest rates for XAUUSDT and XAGUSDT Perpetual Contracts. Effective from 2026-01-23 08:00 (UTC), the interest rate component within the funding rate for these contracts will be set to 0%. This adjustment is part of Binance's ongoing efforts to optimize its product offerings and enhance user experience across its services.

Binance users can access the Real-Time Funding Rate page to monitor the latest funding intervals and interest rates. Additionally, API users have the option to query USDⓈ-M futures funding rate information through a newly added endpoint: GET /fapi/v1/fundingInfo. This feature aims to provide users with up-to-date information on funding rates, ensuring transparency and accessibility. The announcement underscores Binance's commitment to maintaining a user-friendly platform by regularly reviewing and updating its services to meet the evolving needs of its global user base.

data.title: BlackRock deposited 3,970 BTC and 82,813 ETH into Coinbase Prime, totaling $603.8 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, BlackRock deposited 3,970 BTC (worth $356.7 million) and 82,813 ETH (worth $247.1 million) into Coinbase Prime.

data.title: Gate will launch spot and instant trading of Sentient (SENT).
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate will launch spot trading of Sentient (SENT) at 20:00 (UTC+8) on January 22, and will list Sentient (SENT) on the Flash Exchange platform at 21:00 (UTC+8).

data.title: Binance Wallet introduces three AI-powered tools
data.description:
Binance Wallet has launched three new AI-powered features on its web-based wallet, aimed at helping users better navigate information-heavy Web3 markets, according to an announcement shared with Finbold on January 22. The new tools, named Social Hype, Topic Rush, and AI Assistant, use Binance’s proprietary AI technology to provide structured, real-time insights across multiple blockchains, including BNB Smart Chain (BSC), Solana (SOL), and Base. AI features focus on trend discovery and token analysis According to Binance Wallet, the Topic Rush feature is designed to identify emerging market narratives by analyzing meme activity and influential social media posts. Tokens are grouped into topic cards within seconds, with each topic categorized by lifecycle stage based on capital inflows
source: https://finbold.com/binance-wallet-introduces-three-ai-powered-tools/
